history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A tender anime-style illustration captures a romantic moment between two young individuals. The focus is on their faces as they share a gentle kiss, with rosy cheeks and closed eyes conveying shyness and affection. The character on the left has long, dark hair styled in a ponytail, adorned with a choker necklace and dangling earrings. She wears a black top with a V-neckline. The character on the right has short, dark hair and wears a black jacket over a light-colored shirt with a graphic design.

The background is softly blurred, suggesting a setting of stairs or a tiered structure, with muted, warm lighting that casts a gentle glow. The overall color palette is soft and pastel, dominated by muted blues, grays, and warm, ethereal light. The mood is intimate, sweet, and romantic, evoking a sense of young love and a cherished memory. The art style is clean and typical of modern anime, with smooth lines and expressive character designs.
